overall.description: A first-person exploration sequence from Cyberpunk 2077, beginning on a waterfront promenade in a futuristic city, descending into a canal to explore submerged debris, and emerging into a plaza beneath elevated highways. The scene features bright morning sunlight, holographic advertisements, and dystopian urban architecture.

events.description: pedestrians walk past the camera from right to left

agents.ego_description: walking along the gravel waterfront path toward the canal edge

notable_agents.action: woman in red jacket walking with child, moving past the camera

entered.detail: large green glowing holographic display on building facade showing rotating graphics
weathered concrete canal wall with metal railings
massive concrete highway overpass with support pillars
murky green water in the urban canal

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunny waterfront promenade in a futuristic city. The camera walks forward along a gravel path beside a canal, passing pedestrians including a woman and child. A large green holographic advertisement glows on a distant building while an elevated highway looms overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned concrete platform with discarded furniture

events.description: approaching concrete platform area with abandoned furniture
NPC character runs past the camera toward the water

agents.ego_description: examining the abandoned couch and trash on the platform, then moving toward the stairs leading into the water

notable_agents.action: male vagrant in tattered clothing running past the camera toward the canal edge

entered.detail: dilapidated brown leather sofa with exposed stuffing and burn marks
raised concrete area with steps leading down to water level
staircase descending into the canal water

segments.scene_description: The camera moves onto a concrete platform beneath an overhang, revealing an abandoned leather couch surrounded by trash and aluminum cans. The lighting becomes dimmer and more shadowed. A vagrant runs past the camera, and the viewpoint approaches stairs leading down into the murky canal water.

scene_state.functional_zone: submerged urban canal with underwater debris field

events.description: descending stairs and entering the water
submerging completely underwater with murky visibility and refracted sunlight

agents.ego_description: walking down concrete stairs into the canal, then swimming underwater through debris

entered.detail: sunken furniture including sofas, tires, and trash visible through murky water
bright shimmering light patterns on the water surface above

segments.scene_description: The camera descends concrete stairs into the canal, transitioning from air to water. The view becomes completely submerged in murky green water filled with sunken debris including furniture and tires. Sunlight filters through the surface creating shimmering patterns while the camera moves through the underwater environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: canal water surface with concrete embankments

events.description: surfacing from underwater to water level view

agents.ego_description: swimming along the canal surface toward a distant staircase and outdoor seating area

entered.detail: large colorful patio umbrella over outdoor seating on the canal bank
massive concrete support columns for the elevated highway above

segments.scene_description: The camera surfaces, revealing a water-level view of the canal with concrete embankments on both sides. The scene transitions from murky underwater to open air with sunlight reflecting off the water surface. In the distance, outdoor seating with umbrellas and massive highway support pillars become visible as the camera swims forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza under elevated highway with outdoor cafe seating

events.description: ascending stairs and exiting the water into plaza area
reaching top of stairs and walking into pedestrian plaza

agents.ego_description: climbing concrete stairs out of the canal and walking into the plaza area beneath the highway

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking through the plaza under the highway overpass

entered.detail: open paved area with patterned concrete under the highway structure
concrete table with attached benches under colorful umbrella
curved highway overpass with vehicles visible on upper deck

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends concrete stairs out of the canal into a shaded plaza beneath massive highway overpasses. The area features outdoor cafe seating with colorful umbrellas and picnic tables. Pedestrians walk through the plaza as the camera moves forward, with futuristic buildings and highway ramps visible in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins on a sunny urban promenade, descends into the depths of a murky canal, and eventually emerges into a shaded city plaza. It begins by walking along a gravel waterfront path past pedestrians and glowing holographic advertisements under the shadow of an elevated highway. As the camera moves onto a dim concrete platform cluttered with trash, it follows a running vagrant toward a set of stairs before plunging beneath the surface into green, debris-filled water where sunlight filters down in shimmering patterns. The scene then shifts as the camera surfaces into the open air of the canal, swimming toward massive highway pillars and distant umbrellas. Finally, the viewpoint ascends a set of concrete stairs to enter a shaded plaza filled with outdoor cafe seating and pedestrians beneath the towering architecture of highway overpasses.
